title: stachys byzantina
intro: Stachys byzantina, also known as the Lamb's Ears or Woolly Betony, is a type of perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and the Balkans. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Stachys byzantina is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
